(1) These rules may be called the Environment (Protection) Fifth Amendment Rules, 2009. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986, in Schedule - VI, in Part D relating to General Standards, in the entries under item 1IJ relating to Load / Mass Based Standards, for serial number 6 relating to ‘Oil Refineries’ and entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely :- -- 2 of 4 -- [Mm—EvE 3G ST T TSR 2 SHERO |_S.No. Xnd'ustry ] l;inmmr ~ Standard ] ! 2 3 4 1 “ Installed Capacity Kg/ tonne of ¢ gfi?fleflm of SRU* sulphur in the feed Refinery __toSRU (Sulphur (tonne/day) Existing New Recovery) SRU SRU | above 20 26 10 Sulphur Dioxide 51020 20 0 o o upto5 120 80 | * SRU - Sutphur Recovery Unit”.
